name: FastSolv
description: Predict the solubility of a solute/solvent solution for a given temperature.
capabilities: Predict the solubility of a solute/solvent solution for a given temperature

solute_smiles.description: SMILES string of the solute molecule

solvent_smiles.description: SMILES string of the solvent molecule

temperature.description: Temperature in Kelvin for solubility prediction
